title: GT Community Additions
description:
GregTech Modern Add-on
New multiblocks, materials, etc
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ad13bfac4d5ddb6031bc3d61da74ac6d650a948.jpeg)

# THIS MOD REQUIRES:
- GTCEu Modern (1.6.1+ since version 1.2.0; 7.0.0+ since version 2.0.0; 7.2.0+ since version 2.1.0)
- GT-- 1.1.2+(Optional, but recommended) without it some recipes will be missing!

# GTCA aka GregTech Community Additions! 
Addon is in development, feedback appreciated(Official GregTech CEu discord, tag @mordgren or @sensesgone)



## This mod adds some things from GT++, BartWorks, GTNH Modpack and also original ones


- Advanced EBF (Aka reworked Volcanus from GT++) 
- Green House (Finally no need for kubejs one)
- Steam Pressurizer (Original)
- Chemical Combustion engines (Original)
- Polymerizer (Original)
- Extreme Heat Exchanger (GTNH) 
- SuperCritical Steam Turbine (GTNH)
- Mega Oil Cracker (GTNH)
- Mega Chemical Reactor (GTNH)
- Industrial Coke Oven (GTNH)
- Thermal Reaction Chamber (Original)
- COMET Cyclotron (GTNH)
- IsaMill (GTNH)
- Flotation Cell Regulator (GTNH)
- Tegmark Forge (Original)
- PCB Factory (GTNH)
- Nano Forge (GTNH)

## Also added:

- New fuels
- Some chemical chains 
- Ore processing Chains 
  


### **_In plans:_**
